mapper.sql: select transaction_id, account_id, elder_id, institution_id, transaction_no, transaction_type, business_type, amount, balance_before, balance_after, service_balance, deposit_balance, member_balance, transaction_date, related_order_id, related_transfer_id, counterparty, business_desc, operator, create_time, remark from transaction_record

select tr.transaction_id, tr.account_id, tr.elder_id, tr.institution_id, tr.transaction_no, tr.transaction_type, tr.business_type, tr.amount, tr.balance_before, tr.balance_after, tr.service_balance, tr.deposit_balance, tr.member_balance, tr.transaction_date, tr.related_order_id, tr.related_transfer_id, tr.counterparty, tr.business_desc, tr.operator, tr.create_time, tr.remark, ei.elder_name, pi.institution_name from transaction_record tr left join elder_info ei on tr.elder_id = ei.elder_id left join pension_institution pi on tr.institution_id = pi.institution_id
mapper.select: where tr.account_id = #{accountId} order by tr.transaction_date desc
where tr.institution_id = #{institutionId} order by tr.transaction_date desc
where tr.elder_id = #{elderId} order by tr.transaction_date desc
where tr.related_transfer_id = #{transferId} order by tr.transaction_date desc

select count(*) as totalCount, sum(amount) as totalAmount, sum(case when transaction_type = '1' then 1 else 0 end) as incomeCount, sum(case when transaction_type = '1' then amount else 0 end) as incomeAmount, sum(case when transaction_type = '2' then 1 else 0 end) as expenseCount, sum(case when transaction_type = '2' then amount else 0 end) as expenseAmount from transaction_record where institution_id = #{institutionId} and date_format(transaction_date, '%Y-%m-%d') = #{today}
where 1=1 and (amount < 0 or balance_before < 0 or balance_after < 0) order by tr.transaction_date desc
mapper.insert:
insert into transaction_record
account_id, elder_id, institution_id, transaction_no, transaction_type, business_type, amount, balance_before, balance_after, service_balance, deposit_balance, member_balance, transaction_date, related_order_id, related_transfer_id, counterparty, business_desc, operator, create_time, remark,
#{accountId}, #{elderId}, #{institutionId}, #{transactionNo}, #{transactionType}, #{businessType}, #{amount}, #{balanceBefore}, #{balanceAfter}, #{serviceBalance}, #{depositBalance}, #{memberBalance}, #{transactionDate}, #{relatedOrderId}, #{relatedTransferId}, #{counterparty}, #{businessDesc}, #{operator}, #{createTime}, #{remark},
mapper.delete:
delete from transaction_record where transaction_id in
#{transactionId}
